seoTitle: Camden Park vs Camden South — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Camden Park and Camden South. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Camden Park vs Camden South: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Camden Park and Camden South.
heading: Camden Park vs Camden South — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Camden Park, New South Wales and Camden South, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Camden Park has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Camden South (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Camden Park or Camden South safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Camden Park has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Camden South scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Camden Park scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Camden South scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Camden Park or Camden South?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Camden Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
